results.rendered_html: bhūma = bhūmi am Ende einiger compp.  P. 5,4,75, Vārtt.   VOP. 6,84. fg.  Vgl. utkṛṣṭa˚ (unter utkṛṣṭa), udaka˚, udagbhūma, kavi˚, kṛṣṇa˚, tri˚, pāṇḍu˚. Selbständig in der Formel dhruvāya bhūmāya (so v. a. bhaumāya) svāhā  TAITT. ĀR. 10,68 .
